text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, October 16. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. School projects are fun. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Staying active is key. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. He is doing so well. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Staying active is key. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Ethan did great with his school homework. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
